testcase.name: test_calculator_submit_full
testcase.failure: tests/test_modal_form_endpoints.py:202: in test_calculator_submit_full assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","privilege_card"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":false,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_calculator_quote_preview
testcase.failure: tests/test_modal_form_endpoints.py:236: in test_calculator_quote_preview assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","privilege_card"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":false,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
